{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01TcG9AuZGKH2Gh9vrRoMyRG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01CS2o8CWhWvQG7BeXf57bTM","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/analyze.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\n\ndef loadcat(pat):\n    return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('/app/'+pat))], ignore_index=True)\n\n# ---------- business hours helper ----------\nWS, WE = 9, 17          # work window UTC\nHPD = WE - WS           # 8 hours/day\nREF = np.datetime64('2024-01-01')  # a Monday\n\ndef bh_point(ts):\n    \"\"\"cumulative business hours for a timestamp series (pandas datetime).\"\"\"\n    ts = pd.to_datetime(ts)\n    dates = ts.values.astype('datetime64[D]')\n    nbus = np.busday_count(REF, dates)  # business days in [REF, date)\n    hour = ts.dt.hour + ts.dt.minute/60 + ts.dt.second/3600\n    intra = np.clip(hour.values, WS, WE) - WS\n    return nbus * HPD + intra\n\ndef bh_dur(start, end):\n    return bh_point(end) - bh_point(start)\n\n# ---------- load ----------\nemp = pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv')\nta  = loadcat('task_assignment_*.csv')\ncr  = loadcat('code_review_*.csv')\nap  = loadcat('approval_*.csv')\n\n# assignment durations (business hours)\nta['dur'] = bh_dur(ta['assigned_at'], ta['unassigned_at'])\ncr['dur'] = bh_dur(cr['requested_at'], cr['completed_at'])\nap['dur'] = bh_dur(ap['requested_at'], ap['resolved_at'])\n\nprint(\"assignment dur (bh) describe:\")\nprint(ta['dur'].describe())\nprint(\"\\nper assignment_role median business hours:\")\nprint(ta.groupby('assignment_role')['dur'].agg(['count','median','mean']))\n\nprint(\"\\ncode_review dur (bh) median:\", cr['dur'].median(), \" approval dur median:\", ap['dur'].median())\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":912,"cache_read_input_tokens":30128,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":912,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":62,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"81f1fa4c-420c-4a19-b088-a478e824890f","uuid":"4b4f9c17-940c-4539-bd53-55cb004b5239","request_id":"req_011Cbf93hr2FMXrFPmSd1ZJT"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CS2o8CWhWvQG7BeXf57bTM","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /app/analyze.py (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"81f1fa4c-420c-4a19-b088-a478e824890f","uuid":"22d3d8c3-412a-46fa-9635-7d300f4d4a6f","timestamp":"2026-06-02T21:26:26.825Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/app/analyze.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\n\ndef loadcat(pat):\n    return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('/app/'+pat))], ignore_index=True)\n\n# ---------- business hours helper ----------\nWS, WE = 9, 17          # work window UTC\nHPD = WE - WS           # 8 hours/day\nREF = np.datetime64('2024-01-01')  # a Monday\n\ndef bh_point(ts):\n    \"\"\"cumulative business hours for a timestamp series (pandas datetime).\"\"\"\n    ts = pd.to_datetime(ts)\n    dates = ts.values.astype('datetime64[D]')\n    nbus = np.busday_count(REF, dates)  # business days in [REF, date)\n    hour = ts.dt.hour + ts.dt.minute/60 + ts.dt.second/3600\n    intra = np.clip(hour.values, WS, WE) - WS\n    return nbus * HPD + intra\n\ndef bh_dur(start, end):\n    return bh_point(end) - bh_point(start)\n\n# ---------- load ----------\nemp = pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv')\nta  = loadcat('task_assignment_*.csv')\ncr  = loadcat('code_review_*.csv')\nap  = loadcat('approval_*.csv')\n\n# assignment durations (business hours)\nta['dur'] = bh_dur(ta['assigned_at'], ta['unassigned_at'])\ncr['dur'] = bh_dur(cr['requested_at'], cr['completed_at'])\nap['dur'] = bh_dur(ap['requested_at'], ap['resolved_at'])\n\nprint(\"assignment dur (bh) describe:\")\nprint(ta['dur'].describe())\nprint(\"\\nper assignment_role median business hours:\")\nprint(ta.groupby('assignment_role')['dur'].agg(['count','median','mean']))\n\nprint(\"\\ncode_review dur (bh) median:\", cr['dur'].median(), \" approval dur median:\", ap['dur'].median())\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}
